name: knowz
description: Frictionless knowledge management via the Knowz MCP server for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Query and capture durable knowledge across Knowz vaults
interface.longDescription: Bring Knowz knowledge management into Codex with vault-aware skills that query, save, amend durable knowledge, and configure shared Codex Knowz access. Workflow continuity is handled by KnowzCode.
defaultPrompt: Search our Knowz vaults for prior art on this feature
Save this implementation decision to the right Knowz vault
Help configure the Knowz MCP connection for Codex
